rows.cycle_goal_summary: Continue evidence-first survival and settlement work under the active LifeGoal.
rows.what_happened: Jun inspected the shared chest (shared-chest-1) and the runtime classifier marked the action as verified progress. The inspected chest snapshot shows an empty items list (no items recorded in the inspection result).

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Gather nearby logs to start the wood->planks->sticks->basic tool / starter shelter chain (shared chest is empty).
rows.what_happened: Jun (npc_b) attempted the action-skill collectLogs after confirming via observe that nearby log blocks were expected. The collect_logs tool was blocked: it found no reachable low log block within the tool’s 24-block search radius, resulting in beforeLogCount=0 and afterLogCount=0 (inventory delta 0). The runtime classifier marked this as no progress.

The verified nearby sampled set (not exhaustive; capped/truncated) showed only ice as the dominant block candidate, plus some dirt/sand and a small amount of water. No wood/log-bearing blocks were observed. Inventory remained empty (no collected items).
